title: XP-Sync
description: Fixes a bug that causes XP to "Disappear" when entering/exiting a dimension with a high y cord.
body: Fixes part of MC-124177, which causes a bug which makes the xp bar reset to zero. The client will think it has no exp. This happens when entering/exiting a dimension with a high Y coordinate. This mod fixes that by adding and then removing 1 xp, forcing the client to sync back up with the server. (Works in singleplayer as well, since it uses an internal server)
